name: agent-loop-video
description: OpenClaw Agent Loop 深度剖析视频

scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts AgentLoopVideo out/video.mp4 --browser-executable '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
scripts.render-vertical: remotion render src/index.ts AgentLoopVideo out/video-vertical.mp4 --browser-executable '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
